name: tenable
explanation: Tenable ships only a logs configuration that tails Nessus log files (backend.log, www_server.log) - there is no Agent check class, no metrics endpoint, and no network probe. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply: enabling the integration is purely a question of whether Nessus log files exist at the expected paths on the host, and which API access keys the user wants to use for any external Tenable APIs.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only / instrumentation-only). The integration has no datadog_checks/tenable/<name>.py implementation - it is purely a logs config + manifest.
